Relationships are the worst, especially when they break your heart and make fun of you.

2D thought everything was over with Paula, but she reappeared asking for a second chance

He should have said no.

He already had a special connection with you, but he still came back to her like an abandoned puppy.

Even if he had kissed you the night before.
